## Meeting Purpose

[Interview Jacob Cutter for an Applied AI Scientist role.](https://fathom.video/share/Gaav_wyScK6zxGkjXz2vabZY4T9A7bbv?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Relevant Experience:** Jacob Cutter's background in low-latency ASR (DeepGram) and building Salesforce's voice agent (AgentForce) directly applies to GrowthX's need for a robust, high-quality content generation pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/Gaav_wyScK6zxGkjXz2vabZY4T9A7bbv?tab=summary&timestamp=1395.0)
  - [**Proposed Solution:** To measure and improve content quality, Cutter suggested an agentic workflow using an "LLM as a judge." This system would score content on criteria like tone and factual grounding, then loop back to regenerate specific pipeline stages for targeted improvement.](https://fathom.video/share/Gaav_wyScK6zxGkjXz2vabZY4T9A7bbv?tab=summary&timestamp=2409.0)
  - [**Role Alignment:** The proposed solution aligns perfectly with the Applied AI Scientist role, which requires defining a quality evaluation framework, building the technical roadmap, and implementing the necessary platform changes.](https://fathom.video/share/Gaav_wyScK6zxGkjXz2vabZY4T9A7bbv?tab=summary&timestamp=3755.0)

## Topics

### Candidate Background

  - [**Education:** PhD in experimental particle physics, focusing on signal-to-noise analysis for dark matter detectors.](https://fathom.video/share/Gaav_wyScK6zxGkjXz2vabZY4T9A7bbv?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [**DeepGram (3.5 years):**](https://fathom.video/share/Gaav_wyScK6zxGkjXz2vabZY4T9A7bbv?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
      - [Built dozens of ASR models for specific use cases (e.g., phone calls).](https://fathom.video/share/Gaav_wyScK6zxGkjXz2vabZY4T9A7bbv?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
      - [Led a skunkworks project to develop a patent-pending, low-latency transformer ASR architecture, significantly boosting accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/Gaav_wyScK6zxGkjXz2vabZY4T9A7bbv?tab=summary&timestamp=1589.0)
      - [Built PyTorch pipelines for post-processing models to improve punctuation.](https://fathom.video/share/Gaav_wyScK6zxGkjXz2vabZY4T9A7bbv?tab=summary&timestamp=1669.0)
  - [**Tenex (6 months):**](https://fathom.video/share/Gaav_wyScK6zxGkjXz2vabZY4T9A7bbv?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
      - [Worked on end-to-end voice agents (ASR, TTS, LLMs) with a strong focus on low latency for natural conversation.](https://fathom.video/share/Gaav_wyScK6zxGkjXz2vabZY4T9A7bbv?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
      - [Acquired by Salesforce.](https://fathom.video/share/Gaav_wyScK6zxGkjXz2vabZY4T9A7bbv?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)

### Salesforce: AgentForce Voice Agent

  - [**Project:** Tech lead for the "reasoner" service, the "brain" of Salesforce's GA voice agent.](https://fathom.video/share/Gaav_wyScK6zxGkjXz2vabZY4T9A7bbv?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [**Problem:** The existing text-based agent was too slow and lacked voice-specific logic (e.g., handling interrupts).](https://fathom.video/share/Gaav_wyScK6zxGkjXz2vabZY4T9A7bbv?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)
  - [**Solution:** Built a new agentic workflow from scratch, optimized for low latency and natural conversation.](https://fathom.video/share/Gaav_wyScK6zxGkjXz2vabZY4T9A7bbv?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)
  - [**Key Components:**](https://fathom.video/share/Gaav_wyScK6zxGkjXz2vabZY4T9A7bbv?tab=summary&timestamp=961.0)
      - [**Prompting:** Guardrails, dynamic context updates, and voice-specific output formatting.](https://fathom.video/share/Gaav_wyScK6zxGkjXz2vabZY4T9A7bbv?tab=summary&timestamp=961.0)
      - [**RAG:** Integrates customer-provided knowledge bases (chunked docs, embeddings) via Salesforce Data Cloud.](https://fathom.video/share/Gaav_wyScK6zxGkjXz2vabZY4T9A7bbv?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [**Tool Calling:** Enables agents to execute actions in the Salesforce backend.](https://fathom.video/share/Gaav_wyScK6zxGkjXz2vabZY4T9A7bbv?tab=summary&timestamp=1082.0)
      - [**Entity Confirmation:** A mechanism for slot filling and verifying spoken details (e.g., email addresses) before action execution.](https://fathom.video/share/Gaav_wyScK6zxGkjXz2vabZY4T9A7bbv?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)

### Case Study 1: Content Quality Scoring

  - [**Goal:** Design a system to systematically score and improve the quality of AI-generated marketing content.](https://fathom.video/share/Gaav_wyScK6zxGkjXz2vabZY4T9A7bbv?tab=summary&timestamp=1742.0)
  - [**Proposed Metrics:**](https://fathom.video/share/Gaav_wyScK6zxGkjXz2vabZY4T9A7bbv?tab=summary&timestamp=2107.0)
      - [**Core Attributes:** Conciseness, specificity, grammar, readability.](https://fathom.video/share/Gaav_wyScK6zxGkjXz2vabZY4T9A7bbv?tab=summary&timestamp=2340.0)
      - [**Marketing-Specific:** Tone, use of appropriate buzzwords, grounding in customer context, factual accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/Gaav_wyScK6zxGkjXz2vabZY4T9A7bbv?tab=summary&timestamp=2284.0)
  - [**Proposed System:**](https://fathom.video/share/Gaav_wyScK6zxGkjXz2vabZY4T9A7bbv?tab=summary&timestamp=2409.0)
      - [**Method:** Use an "LLM as a judge" to score content against the defined criteria.](https://fathom.video/share/Gaav_wyScK6zxGkjXz2vabZY4T9A7bbv?tab=summary&timestamp=2060.0)
      - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/Gaav_wyScK6zxGkjXz2vabZY4T9A7bbv?tab=summary&timestamp=2456.0)
        1.  [**Evaluate:** Score content on each metric.](https://fathom.video/share/Gaav_wyScK6zxGkjXz2vabZY4T9A7bbv?tab=summary&timestamp=2717.0)
        2.  [**Loop:** If scores are low, regenerate the content.](https://fathom.video/share/Gaav_wyScK6zxGkjXz2vabZY4T9A7bbv?tab=summary&timestamp=2717.0)
        3.  [**Refine:** Update prompts or context to improve future outputs.](https://fathom.video/share/Gaav_wyScK6zxGkjXz2vabZY4T9A7bbv?tab=summary&timestamp=2569.0)
      - [**Implementation:** Integrate this evaluation loop into the existing agentic content pipeline, allowing for targeted regeneration of specific stages (e.g., a tone rewrite).](https://fathom.video/share/Gaav_wyScK6zxGkjXz2vabZY4T9A7bbv?tab=summary&timestamp=2612.0)

### Case Study 2: LLM Search Visibility

  - [**Goal:** Measure and improve a brand's visibility in LLM search results (e.g., ChatGPT, Gemini).](https://fathom.video/share/Gaav_wyScK6zxGkjXz2vabZY4T9A7bbv?tab=summary&timestamp=2941.0)
  - [**Proposed Measurement Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/Gaav_wyScK6zxGkjXz2vabZY4T9A7bbv?tab=summary&timestamp=3073.0)
      - [**Method:** Simulate user queries by sending template prompts to LLMs (e.g., "What is the best \[product\] for \[use case\]?").](https://fathom.video/share/Gaav_wyScK6zxGkjXz2vabZY4T9A7bbv?tab=summary&timestamp=3081.0)
      - [**Analysis:** Count brand mentions in the LLM's responses to create a statistical ranking of visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/Gaav_wyScK6zxGkjXz2vabZY4T9A7bbv?tab=summary&timestamp=3081.0)
      - [**Cost Optimization:** Scrape AI Overviews from Google Search results to get free LLM summaries, avoiding direct API costs.](https://fathom.video/share/Gaav_wyScK6zxGkjXz2vabZY4T9A7bbv?tab=summary&timestamp=3233.0)
  - [**Proposed Improvement Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/Gaav_wyScK6zxGkjXz2vabZY4T9A7bbv?tab=summary&timestamp=3461.0)
      - [**Analysis:** Compare the content features of high-visibility brands (using the quality metrics from Case Study 1) against the client's content.](https://fathom.video/share/Gaav_wyScK6zxGkjXz2vabZY4T9A7bbv?tab=summary&timestamp=3461.0)
      - [**Action:** Adjust the content generation pipeline to match the features of top-ranked content.](https://fathom.video/share/Gaav_wyScK6zxGkjXz2vabZY4T9A7bbv?tab=summary&timestamp=3461.0)
      - [**Caveat:** This is an empirical process requiring A/B testing, as LLM search mechanisms vary and evolve.](https://fathom.video/share/Gaav_wyScK6zxGkjXz2vabZY4T9A7bbv?tab=summary&timestamp=3555.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Katja Wittfoth:** Discuss the interview with the team and follow up with Jacob Cutter.](https://fathom.video/share/Gaav_wyScK6zxGkjXz2vabZY4T9A7bbv?tab=summary&timestamp=3826.0)
